capabilities.","url":"/features/qcloud","$ref":"features/qcloud/index.md"}},{"type":"folder","name":"Quantitative Trading File Storage Solutions","children":[],"$id":"fallback:features/quantitative-trading","$ref":{"folder":"features/quantitative-trading"},"index":{"$id":"fallback:features/quantitative-trading/index.md","type":"page","name":"Quantitative Trading File Storage Solutions","description":"Intelligent storage architecture designed for high-frequency trading and quantitative strategy backtesting, supporting millions of IOPS per second for order flow processing.","url":"/features/quantitative-trading","$ref":"features/quantitative-trading/index.md"}},{"type":"folder","name":"Multi-Site, Active-Active Replication for Object Storage","children":[],"$id":"fallback:features/replication","$ref":{"folder":"features/replication"},"index":{"$id":"fallback:features/replication/index.md","type":"page","name":"Multi-Site, Active-Active Replication for Object Storage","description":"Active replication ensures data availability. RustFS supports active-active replication. It operates at the bucket level.","url":"/features/replication","$ref":"features/replication/index.md"}},{"type":"folder","name":"Amazon S3 Compatibility","children":[],"$id":"fallback:features/s3-compatibility","$ref":{"folder":"features/s3-compatibility"},"index":{"$id":"fallback:features/s3-compatibility/index.md","type":"page","name":"Amazon S3 Compatibility","description":"S3 compatibility is essential for cloud-native applications. RustFS strictly adheres to S3 API standards. RustFS offers a widely tested S3 alternative.","url":"/features/s3-compatibility","$ref":"features/s3-compatibility/index.md"}},{"type":"folder","name":"Small File Optimization","children":[],"$id":"fallback:features/small-file","$ref":{"folder":"features/small-file"},"index":{"$id":"fallback:features/small-file/index.md","type":"page","name":"Small File Retention policies specify the retention period set on object versions, either explicitly or through bucket default…","url":"/features/worm","$ref":"features/worm/index.md"}}],"$id":"fallback:features","$ref":{"folder":"features"}},{"type":"folder","name":"RustFS Installation Guide","children":[{"type":"folder","name":"Checklists","children":[{"$id":"fallback:installation/checklists/hardware-checklists.md","type":"page","name":"Production Environment Hardware Configuration Guide","description":"RustFS is a high-performance distributed object storage system developed in Rust, suitable for massive unstructured data storage scenarios. deployment.","url":"/installation/checklists/hardware-checklists","$ref":"installation/checklists/hardware-checklists.md"},{"$id":"fallback:installation/checklists/hardware-selection.md","type":"page","name":"Hardware When using the…","url":"/trademark","$ref":"trademark/index.md"}},{"type":"folder","name":"Troubleshooting","children":[{"$id":"fallback:troubleshooting/driver.md","type":"page","name":"Hard Drive Failures","description":"RustFS ensures read/write access can still be provided when some disks fail through mechanisms similar to erasure coding, and automatically heals data after replacing disks.","url":"/troubleshooting/driver","$ref":"troubleshooting/driver.md"},{"$id":"fallback:troubleshooting/healing.md","type":"page","name":"Object Inspection and Auto-Recovery","description":"How RustFS object self-healing works: design principles, trigger paths, scrub and repair process, and usage notes.","url":"/troubleshooting/healing","$ref":"troubleshooting/healing.md"},{"$id":"fallback:troubleshooting/node.md","type":"page","name":"Node Failures","description":"Complete steps for handling node failures in RustFS clusters. Mainly includes: replacement node hardware preparation, configuration updates, service deployment, rejoining the cluster, data healing, and subsequent checks and best practices.","url":"/troubleshooting/node","$ref":"troubleshooting/node.md"}],"$id":"fallback:troubleshooting","$ref":{"folder":"troubleshooting"},"index":{"$id":"fallback:troubleshooting/index.md","type":"page","name":"Troubleshooting","description":"Diagnose and Scalability","description":"Learn about RustFS upgrades and scaling.","url":"/upgrade-scale","$ref":"upgrade-scale/index.md"}}]}},"tabs":[],"tabMode":"sidebar","sidebar":{"footer":"$L6"},"nav":{"title":"$L7","url":"https://rustfs.com"},"githubUrl":"https://github.com/rustfs/rustfs","links":[{"text":"Home","url":"https://rustfs.com","external":true},{"text":"Docs","url":"/"},{"text":"Installation","url":"/installation/linux"},{"text":"MCP","url":"/developer/mcp"},{"text":"SDK","url":"/developer/sdk"},{"text":"Demo","url":"https://play.rustfs.com","external":true},{"text":"Community","url":"https://github.com/rustfs/rustfs/discussions","external":true},{"text":"Blog","url":"https://rustfs.dev","external":true},{"type":"icon","label":"Twitter","icon":"$L8","text":"Twitter","url":"https://twitter.com/rustfsofficial","external":true}],"children":["$L9","$La"]}],"ETAG:page:/features/aliyun":1,"ROUTE":["/features/aliyun",""],"IS_STATIC":true,"HAS404":true,"_buildId":"xdm5_1Q6"}
6:["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-col gap-0.5 px-2 py-3 text-xs text-fd-muted-foreground","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":"Released under the Apache License 2.0."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Copyright © 2025 RustFS"}]]}]
7:["$","img",null,{"src":"/images/logo.svg","alt":"RustFS","width":96,"height":24,"style":{"height":24,"width":"auto"}}]
8:["$","svg",null,{"role":"img","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","width":"18","height":"18","fill":"currentColor","children":["$","path",null,{"d":"M18.244 2.25h3.308l-7.227 8.26 8.502 11.24H16.17l-5.214-6.817L4.99 21.75H1.68l7.73-8.835L1.254 2.25H8.08l4.713 6.231zm-1.161 17.52h1.833L7.084 4.126H5.117z"}]}]
9:[["$","title",null,{"children":"RustFS for Alibaba Cloud Kubernetes Service"}],["$","meta",null,{"property":"og:title","content":"RustFS for Alibaba Cloud Kubernetes Service"}],["$","meta",null,{"property":"og:description","content":"RustFS provides high-performance object storage for Alibaba Cloud ACK with hybrid cloud capabilities and enterprise features."}],["$","meta",null,{"name":"description","content":"RustFS provides high-performance object storage for Alibaba Cloud ACK with hybrid cloud capabilities and enterprise features."}],[["$","$b","0",{"children":[["$","meta",null,{"property":"og:image","content":"https://docs.rustfs.com/features/aliyun.webp"}],["$","meta",null,{"property":"og:image:width","content":"1200"}],["$","meta",null,{"property":"og:image:height","content":"630"}],["$","meta",null,{"property":"twitter:card","content":"summary_large_image"}]]}]]]
a:["$","$Lc",null,{"toc":[{"depth":2,"url":"#three-reasons-customers-run-rustfs-on-alibaba-cloud","title":"Three Reasons Customers Run RustFS on Alibaba Cloud"},{"depth":2,"url":"#rustfs-operator-natively-integrates-with-alibaba-cloud-ack-features","title":"RustFS Operator Natively Integrates with Alibaba Cloud ACK Features"},{"depth":3,"url":"#feature-overview","title":"Feature Overview"},{"depth":2,"url":"#storage-classes-and-tiering","title":"Storage Classes and Tiering"},{"depth":2,"url":"#external-load-balancing","title":"External Load Balancing"},{"depth":2,"url":"#encryption-key-management","title":"Encryption Key Management"},{"depth":2,"url":"#identity-management","title":"Identity Management"},{"depth":2,"url":"#certificate-management","title":"Certificate Management"},{"depth":2,"url":"#monitoring-and-alerting","title":"Monitoring and Alerting"},{"depth":2,"url":"#logging-and-auditing","title":"Logging and Auditing"}],"children":[["$","$Ld",null,{"children":"RustFS for Alibaba Cloud Kubernetes Service"}],["$","$Le",null,{"className":"mb-0","children":"RustFS provides high-performance object storage for Alibaba Cloud ACK with hybrid cloud capabilities and enterprise features."}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-row gap-2 items-center border-b pt-2 pb-6","children":[["$","$Lf",null,{"markdownUrl":"/features/aliyun.md"}],["$","$L10",null,{"markdownUrl":"/features/aliyun.md","githubUrl":"https://github.com/rustfs/docs.rustfs.com/blob/main/content/features/aliyun/index.md"}]]}],["$","$L11",null,{"children":[["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"three-reasons-customers-run-rustfs-on-alibaba-cloud","children":"Three Reasons Customers Run RustFS on Alibaba Cloud"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"RustFS serves as a consistent storage layer in hybrid cloud or multi-cloud deployment scenarios"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"RustFS is a Kubernetes-native high-performance product that delivers predictable performance across public cloud, private cloud, and edge environments."}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Running RustFS on ACK provides control over the software stack with the flexibility needed to avoid cloud lock-in."}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Alibaba Cloud ACK is a managed service for running Kubernetes on Alibaba Cloud without needing to install, operate, and maintain your own Kubernetes control plane or nodes."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"RustFS provides portable high-performance object storage systems on all major Kubernetes platforms (Alibaba Cloud ACK, Tanzu, Azure, GCP, Alibaba Cloud ACK). On Alibaba Cloud, RustFS integrates natively with Alibaba Cloud ACK services, making it easier to run your own large-scale multi-tenant object storage as a service. RustFS is a complete alternative to AWS S3 storage as a service."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","$L13",null,{"sizes":"(max-width: 768px) 100vw, (max-width: 1200px) 70vw, 900px","alt":"RustFS Architecture Diagram","src":"/assets/sec1-1-Cy36oRiV.png","className":"rounded-lg"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Unlike AWS S3, RustFS enables applications to scale across multi-cloud and hybrid cloud infrastructure without expensive software rewrites or proprietary integrations. Because RustFS is containerized and Kubernetes-native, it can be deployed on these platforms without specialized skills to operate large-scale storage infrastructure."}],"\n",["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"rustfs-operator-natively-integrates-with-alibaba-cloud-ack-features","children":"RustFS Operator Natively Integrates with Alibaba Cloud ACK Features"}],"\n",["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h3","id":"feature-overview","children":"Feature Overview"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Storage Classes and Tiering"}]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"External Load Balancing"}]}],"\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n"]}],"\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c","\n","$L2d","\n","$L2e","\n","$L2f","\n","$L30","\n","$L31"]}],"$undefined"]}]
14:["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Encryption Key Management"}]}]
15:["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Identity Management"}]}]
16:["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Certificate Management"}]}]
17:["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Monitoring and Alerting"}]}]
18:["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Logging and Auditing"}]}]
19:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"storage-classes-and-tiering","children":"Storage Classes and Tiering"}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":"A key requirement for deploying RustFS at scale on Alibaba Cloud ACK is capability tiers across storage classes (NVMe, HDD, public cloud). This enables enterprises to manage both cost and performance simultaneously."}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":"RustFS supports automatic transition of aging objects from fast NVMe tiers to more cost-effective HDD tiers, and even to cost-optimized cold public cloud storage tiers."}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":"When tiering, RustFS provides a unified namespace across tiers. Movement across tiers is transparent to applications and triggered by customer-defined policies."}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":"RustFS provides secure storage in Alibaba Cloud ACK hybrid clouds by encrypting objects at the source, ensuring customers always have complete control over data. When Alibaba Cloud ACK is deployed in public clouds, tiering capabilities help Alibaba Cloud ACK effectively manage data across persistent block storage and cheaper object storage tiers."}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Learn More:"}]}]
1f:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"external-load-balancing","children":"External Load Balancing"}]
20:["$","p",null,{"children":"All RustFS communication is based on HTTP, RESTful APIs, and supports any standard Kubernetes-compatible ingress controller. This includes hardware and software-defined solutions. The most popular choice is NGINX. Install using OperatorHub or OpenShift Marketplace, then expose RustFS tenants using annotations."}]
21:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"encryption-key-management","children":"Encryption Key Management"}]
22:["$","p",null,{"children":"Alibaba Cloud ACK does not provide native key management capabilities. RustFS recommends using HashiCorp Vault to store keys outside the object storage system. This is a best practice for cloud-native applications."}]
23:["$","p",null,{"children":"For all production environments, we recommend enabling encryption on all buckets by default. RustFS uses AES-256-GCM or ChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption to protect data integrity and confidentiality with negligible performance impact."}]
24:["$","p",null,{"children":"RustFS supports all three server-side encryption (SSE-KMS, SSE-S3, and SSE-C) modes. SSE-S3 and SSE-KMS integrate with server-side KMS, while SSE-C uses client-provided keys."}]
25:["$","p",null,{"children":"RustFS will use this KMS to bootstrap its internal key encryption server (KES service) for high-performance per-object encryption. Each tenant runs its own KES server in an isolated namespace."}]
26:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"identity-management","children":"Identity Management"}]
27:["$","p",null,{"children":"When running RustFS on Alibaba Cloud ACK, customers can manage single sign-on (SSO) through third-party OpenID Connect/LDAP compatible identity providers (such as Keycloak, Okta/Auth0, Google, Facebook, ActiveDirectory, and OpenLDAP). RustFS recommends OpenID Connect-compatible Keycloak IDP."}]
28:["$","p",null,{"children":"External IDPs allow administrators to centrally manage user/application identities. RustFS builds on top of IDPs to provide AWS IAM-style user, group, role, policy, and token service APIs. The ability to have a unified identity and access management (IAM) layer independent of infrastructure provides significant architectural flexibility."}]
29:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"certificate-management","children":"Certificate Management"}]
2a:["$","p",null,{"children":"All traffic from applications to RustFS, including inter-node traffic, is encrypted using TLS. TLS certificates are used to secure network communications and establish the identity of network connection resources, such as RustFS server domains."}]
2b:["$","p",null,{"children":"RustFS integrates with OpenShift certificate manager, so you can use the RustFS operator to automatically provision, configure, manage, and update certificates for RustFS tenants. Tenants are completely isolated from each other in their own Kubernetes namespaces with their own certificates for enhanced security."}]
2c:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"monitoring-and-alerting","children":"Monitoring and Alerting"}]
2d:["$","p",null,{"children":"RustFS recommends using Grafana, platform monitoring components installed in the OpenShift-user-workload-monitoring project, or any other OpenShift container monitoring tools to connect to RustFS. RustFS publishes a comprehensive set of storage-related Prometheus metrics, from bucket capacity to access metrics. These metrics can be collected and visualized in any Prometheus-compatible tool or RustFS console."}]
2e:["$","p",null,{"children":"External monitoring solutions periodically scrape RustFS Prometheus endpoints. RustFS recommends using Grafana or platform monitoring components installed in the openshift-user-workload-monitoring project to connect to RustFS. These same tools can also be used to establish baselines and set notification alert thresholds, which can then be routed to notification platforms like PagerDuty, Freshservice, or even SNMP."}]
2f:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"logging-and-auditing","children":"Logging and Auditing"}]
30:["$","p",null,{"children":"Enabling RustFS auditing generates logs for every operation on the object storage cluster. In addition to audit logs, RustFS also logs console errors for troubleshooting."}]
31:["$","p",null,{"children":"RustFS supports sending logs to Elastic Stack (or third-party) for analysis and alerting."}]
